serviceDescription.aws: AWS AppSync is a fully managed service that makes it easy to develop GraphQL APIs and Event APIs.
serviceDescription.aws-cn: Amazon AppSync  is a fully managed service that makes it easy to develop GraphQL APIs.

description.aws: Select AWS services that you want to estimate
description.aws-cn: Select Amazon services that you want to estimate

infoDescription.aws: With AWS AppSync, you pay only for what you use with no minimum fees or mandatory service usage. You are billed separately for AppSync GraphQL and AppSync Events usage.
infoDescription.aws-cn: With Amazon AppSync, you pay only for what you use with no minimum fees or mandatory service usage. You are billed separately for AppSync GraphQL and AppSync Events usage.
